{
  "mnemonics": [
    "SELECT (S)elect *
    (A)llder
    (L)ogin
    (E)xecute",
    "SQL (S)yntax"
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "SQL is a standard language for managing relational databases.",
    "SELECT is used to retrieve data from the database.",
    "ALDER is used to alter the database structure.",
    "LOGIN is used to log in to the database.",
    "EXECUTE is used to execute a SQL statement."
  ]
}
